data.name: WonderLand
data.detailed_description:
Anaïs, a virtual pleasure artist in a world oversaturated with stimuli, navigates a maze of sensations that test the limits of her restless mind. Trapped by agoraphobia, she lives between sleepless nights and intense connections — where desire isn’t escape, it’s expression.

The exact causes of the condition that keeps Anaïs confined within the high walls of her suspended apartment remain uncertain—even to herself. All she knows is that the outside world moves too fast, burns too bright, and speaks too loud. Somewhere along the line, it became too much. So she built her sanctuary. A private capsule of filtered light, glowing interfaces, and synthetic connections—equal parts cocoon and stage.

Anaïs is a professional of pleasure. She works remotely, engaging with clients across every sector of the neon-drenched megalopolis—and perhaps beyond. Her services aren't mere exchanges of desire; they are tailored experiences, immersive performances where sensuality and simulation meet. She is not defined by urges, but instead curates them, orchestrates them. She's not a victim of her condition. She's the architect of her domain.

Occasionally, she allows someone to cross that carefully regulated threshold. A man from the underground rhythms of the city—rough hands, gentle presence. His visits are rare, yet always welcome. After a night charged with intimate intensity, quiet and raw like ritual, he offers her something unusual: a small vaporizer filled with an amber-colored liquid. She doesn’t ask what’s in it.

He says it might help her sleep.

Anaïs accepts. Not out of dependence, but perhaps out of curiosity. Or perhaps longing. The vapor fills her lungs with a subtle, synthetic sweetness. Her mind slows. Her breath softens. The walls remain, but feel lighter now.

Sleep finally arrives—not as an escape, but as a gift.

You will be presented with its interface as soon as you open the game. On the main screen, you will find options such as "Start", "Load" (to continue saved games), and "Config". Accessing an image Gallery from the Gallery button will also be possible. Remember that your language choice needs to happen BEFORE starting or loading your game. This game has an approximate minimum duration of 3 hours.

To advance the story, click on the text to proceed or use the "Auto" option if you want the scenes to follow automatically. This is a great way to relax and get lost in the story, especially in emotional moments!

data.short_description: Anaïs, a virtual pleasure artist in a world oversaturated with stimuli, navigates a maze of sensations that test the limits of her restless mind. Trapped by agoraphobia, she lives between sleepless nights and intense connections — where desire isn’t escape, it’s expression.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 10, Windows® 11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration.
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
